overall.description: A cinematic first-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring moody ambient lighting transitioning from dark green bedroom tones to warm golden living room hues, with detailed examination of modern furniture and holographic decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic bedroom with ambient green floor lighting

agents.ego_description: slowly walking alongside the bed exploring the dimly lit bedroom area

entered.detail: modern platform bed with white linens and pillows
translucent glass room divider with vertical texture
greenish LED strip lighting along the base of walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit futuristic bedroom with green ambient lighting. The camera moves slowly alongside a platform bed with white sheets, passing a textured glass partition wall. The atmosphere is moody and enclosed, with light primarily emanating from floor-level LED strips.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury living room with wooden slat ceiling and wall display

events.description: lighting shifts from dark green to warm golden tones as the living area opens up

agents.ego_description: moving from the bedroom into the main living area revealing the sofa and large wall display

entered.detail: curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats creating a wave pattern
massive illuminated wall feature resembling an aquarium or nature scene with golden lighting
modern low-profile sofa with tufted cream-colored upholstery
rectangular dark coffee table positioned in front of the sofa

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the narrow bedroom into a spacious, open-concept living area. The lighting warms significantly to golden hues, revealing a stunning wooden slatted ceiling and a massive illuminated wall display. A cream-colored modern sofa and coffee table come into view as the bedroom recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: living room center approaching the coffee table

events.description: camera slows to focus on details of the coffee table surface

agents.ego_description: approaching the coffee table to examine the items placed on its surface

entered.detail: various bottles including a clear liquor bottle and green glass bottle
bundles of paper currency arranged on the table
magazine or book opened flat on the table surface
glowing blue spherical hologram containing a fish-like shape

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the coffee table, revealing detailed items including bottles, stacks of cash, and an open magazine. The holographic blue fish decoration becomes visible on the right, and the large wall display dominates the left side with its golden illuminated surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: close examination of wall display and sofa area

events.description: camera pans right along the wall display showing the holographic fish in detail

agents.ego_description: examining the illuminated wall display and holographic decoration while moving along the sofa

segments.scene_description: Moving past the coffee table, the camera focuses on the massive illuminated wall display with its golden nature scene and red branch-like structures. The holographic blue fish glows brightly on the right as the camera travels along the length of the cream-colored sofa.

scene_state.functional_zone: distant area with pink neon accent lighting

events.description: pink neon lights become visible as camera turns to reveal a different area of the apartment

agents.ego_description: turning to explore a different section of the apartment with distinct pink neon lighting

entered.detail: vibrant pink neon light strips illuminating the far wall and ceiling
dark doorway leading to another room or corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right, revealing a different area of the apartment illuminated by vibrant pink neon lights. The previous living area with the wall display and sofa moves out of view, replaced by a darker space with dramatic colored lighting and a distant doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic apartment that transforms from a moody, dimly lit bedroom into a warm, expansive living area before ending in a neon-lit corridor. It begins in a dark bedroom bathed in green ambient light, gliding past a platform bed and a textured glass partition. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens into a spacious living area where the lighting shifts dramatically to golden hues, revealing a wooden slatted ceiling and a cream-colored sofa. The perspective then drifts closer to a coffee table cluttered with cash and bottles, passing a glowing holographic blue fish as the massive illuminated wall display with red branch-like structures dominates the view. Finally, the camera turns right, leaving the golden warmth of the living room behind to enter a darker area defined by vibrant pink neon lights and a distant doorway.
